opaque assign [72..130) "{{- $host := include \"postgresql.v1.primary.fullname\" . }}"
opaque assign [131..185) "{{- $port := include \"postgresql.v1.service.port\" . }}"
opaque assign [186..242) "{{- $customUser := include \"postgresql.v1.username\" . }}"
opaque assign [243..828) "{{- $postgresPassword := include \"common.secrets.lookup\" (dict \"secret\" (include \"postgresql.v1.secretName\" .) \"key\" (coalesce .Values.global.postgresql.auth.secretKeys.adminPasswordKey .Values.auth.secretKeys.adminPasswordKey) \"defaultValue\" (ternary (coalesce .Values.global.postgresql.auth.password .Values.auth.password .Values.global.postgresql.auth.postgresPassword .Values.auth.postgresPassword) (coalesce .Values.global.postgresql.auth.postgresPassword .Values.auth.postgresPassword) (or (empty $customUser) (eq $customUser \"postgres\"))) \"context\" $) | trimAll \"\\\"\" | b64dec }}"
control if [829..952)
  branch [829..898) "{{- if and (not $postgresPassword) .Values.auth.enablePostgresUser }}"
    opaque assign [899..941) "{{- $postgresPassword = randAlphaNum 10 }}"
opaque assign [953..986) "{{- $replicationPassword := \"\" }}"
control if [987..1388)
  branch [987..1034) "{{- if eq .Values.architecture \"replication\" }}"
    opaque assign [1035..1377) "{{- $replicationPassword = include \"common.secrets.passwords.manage\" (dict \"secret\" (include \"postgresql.v1.secretName\" .) \"key\" (coalesce .Values.global.postgresql.auth.secretKeys.replicationPasswordKey .Values.auth.secretKeys.replicationPasswordKey) \"providedValues\" (list \"auth.replicationPassword\") \"context\" $) | trimAll \"\\\"\" | b64dec }}"
opaque assign [1389..1415) "{{- $ldapPassword := \"\" }}"
control if [1416..1592)
  branch [1416..1502) "{{- if and .Values.ldap.enabled (or .Values.ldap.bind_password .Values.ldap.bindpw) }}"
    opaque assign [1503..1581) "{{- $ldapPassword = coalesce .Values.ldap.bind_password .Values.ldap.bindpw }}"
opaque assign [1593..1615) "{{- $password := \"\" }}"
control if [1616..2035)
  branch [1616..1683) "{{- if and (not (empty $customUser)) (ne $customUser \"postgres\") }}"
    opaque assign [1684..2024) "{{- $password = include \"common.secrets.passwords.manage\" (dict \"secret\" (include \"postgresql.v1.secretName\" .) \"key\" (coalesce .Values.global.postgresql.auth.secretKeys.userPasswordKey .Values.auth.secretKeys.userPasswordKey) \"providedValues\" (list \"global.postgresql.auth.password\" \"auth.password\") \"context\" $) | trimAll \"\\\"\" | b64dec }}"
opaque assign [2036..2090) "{{- $database := include \"postgresql.v1.database\" . }}"
control if [2091..3145) ill-nested

    branch [2773..2803) "{{- if $replicationPassword }}"
  entry [2806..2871) open indent=2 key="replication-password" value="⟦{{ $replicationPassword | b64enc | quote }}⟧"
    comment [2887..2977) "# We don't auto-generate LDAP password when it's not provided as we do for other passwords"
  control if [2980..3134) ill-nested
    branch [2980..3066) "{{- if and .Values.ldap.enabled (or .Values.ldap.bind_password .Values.ldap.bindpw) }}"
  entry [3069..3121) open indent=2 key="ldap-password" value="⟦{{ $ldapPassword  | b64enc | quote }}⟧"
control if [3146..5144) ill-nested
